data.name: badge_help_message
data.value: Adds a new badge. Syntax : -add-badge <name>, <image>. Use -add-trophy to add a trophy.

data.name: badge_edit_failure
data.value: An error occurred while updating the badge : {0}

data.name: badge_add_failure_message
data.value: An error occurred while adding the badge : {0}

data.name: addcommand_bad_first_char
data.value: The command's content cannot start with this character.

data.name: customcommandlist_no_commands
data.value: No custom commands have been added to this room.

data.name: dashboard_locale_description
data.value: The locale used by the bot in this room.

data.name: dashboard_errors_description
data.value: Shows the stacktrace of a command that crashed.

data.name: dashboard_autocorrect_description
data.value: Shows suggested commands when someone tries to use a command that doesn't exist.

data.name: room_config_success
data.value: Configuration of room {0} has been updated.

data.name: room_config_failure
data.value: An error occurred while updating the configuration : {0}

data.name: badge_give_help_message
data.value: Gives a badge to someone. Syntax : -givebadge <user>, <badge>

data.name: badge_give_error
data.value: An error occurred while giving the badge : {0}

data.name: badge_pm_missing_room
data.value: In PM, please specify the room. Syntax: -givebadge user, badge, room

data.name: badge_pm_insufficient_rank
data.value: You do not have sufficient permissions in this room.

data.name: user_badge_panel_no_badges
data.value: No badges exist in this room.

data.name: badge_delete_failure
data.value: An error occurred while deleting badge : {0}

data.name: takebadge_failure
data.value: An error occurred while taking the badge : {0}

data.name: takebadge_success
data.value: The user "{0}" no longer has the badge "{1}".

data.name: avatar_help_message
data.value: Updates a user's avatar. Syntax : -avarar <user>, <avatar URL>

data.name: avatar_success
data.value: The user's avatar has been updated.

data.name: avatar_failure
data.value: An error occurred while updating an avatar : {0}

data.name: title_failure
data.value: An error occurred while updating the title : {0}

data.name: title_success
data.value: The user's title has been updated.

data.name: guessing_game_game_ended
data.value: Time is up! The answer was : {0}

data.name: guessing_game_answer_not_found
data.value: No one found the answer in time! The answer was: {0}

data.name: guessing_game_answer_rate_limit
data.value: You are answering too fast! Please wait a moment before trying again.

data.name: guessing_game_round_won
data.value: {0} wins this round ! They now have {1} point{2}

data.name: countries_game_start
data.value: A countriesgame started! Reply with the name of the country directly in the chat.

data.name: capitals_game_start
data.value: A capital cities game started! Reply with the capital city of the given country directly in the chat.

data.name: capitals_game_question_capital
data.value: Which country has {0} as its capital?

data.name: end_guessing_game_no_game
data.value: There's no game currently running in this room.

data.name: team_preview_click_icons
data.value: Click the icons to display the importable version

data.name: dashboard_team_previews_description
data.value: Displays the team of a Pokepaste or CoupCritique link

data.name: add_team_help_message
data.value: Add a team to samples. Syntax: -add-team <link>, <name>, <tier>

data.name: add_team_no_provider
data.value: Impossible to find the team from the link. Please provide either a Pokepaste or a CoupCritique link.

data.name: add_team_failure
data.value: An error occurred when adding team: {0}

data.name: add_team_to_room_team_already_in_room
data.value: This team is already in this room.

data.name: add_team_to_room_failure
data.value: An error occurred while adding a room to a team : {0}

data.name: deleteteam_team_deletion_error
data.value: An error occurred while deleting team : {0}

data.name: parameter_description_has_command_auto_correct
data.value: Shows commands suggestions if a tried command name is similar to an existing one

data.name: parameter_description_is_showing_error_messages
data.value: Shows the error message and the exception stack trace if a command execution fails

data.name: parameter_description_is_showing_team_links_preview
data.value: Shows a preview of a Pokémon team when a Pokepaste or CoupCritique link is shared in chat

data.name: c4_game_rules
data.value: Connect {0} in a row to win the game!

data.name: c4_game_how_to_play
data.value: Click on the cells to play

data.name: c4_game_tie_end
data.value: The game ended in a tie.

data.name: name_color_help
data.value: Gives the color info for a given username.

data.name: setjoinphrase_help_message
data.value: Sets the join phrase of a user for this room. Syntax : -setjoinphrase <user>, <phrase>

data.name: setjoinphrase_success
data.value: The join phrase has been successfully added.

data.name: setjoinphrase_failure
data.value: Could not add the join phrase : {0}

data.name: parameter_description_is_showing_replays_preview
data.value: Shows the players and teams of a replay

data.name: parameter_description_is_showing_youtube_link_preview
data.value: Shows the title and info of a YouTube video when a link is posted

data.name: c4_game_on_timeout
data.value: {0} were disqualified because they could not play in time.

data.name: c4_game_start_announce
data.value: A connect four game has been created. Use {0}c4j to join.

data.name: guessing_game_invalid_number_turns
data.value: Invalid number of turns (should be between 1 and {0})

data.name: pokedesc_start
data.value: A PokeDesc game has been started! Give the name of the corresponding Pokémon directly in the chat.

data.name: pokecries_started
data.value: A PokeCries games has been created! Write the corresponding Pokémon's name directly in the chat.

data.name: dicoenglish_help
data.value: Look up an English word definition. Syntax: -dict <word>

data.name: dicoenglish_suggestions
data.value: Word "{0}" not found. Did you mean: {1}?

data.name: dicoenglish_error
data.value: An error occurred while looking up the definition.

data.name: c4_panel_title
data.value: A connect four game has been created!

data.name: c4_panel_ongoing_game
data.value: A connect four game is ongoing... Players: {0}

data.name: arcade_level_delete_help
data.value: Delete someone from the arcade levels.

data.name: c4_leaderboard_empty
data.value: No ratings found yet. Play some games first!

data.name: arcade_level_update_error
data.value: An error occurred while updating arcade level : {0}

data.name: arcade_level_delete_failure
data.value: An error occurred when deleting arcade level : {0}

data.name: arcade_level_get_not_found
data.value: {0} does not belong to any level.

data.name: clear_points_help
data.value: Reset all points after an event

data.name: clear_points_success
data.value: All user points have been reset to zero.

data.name: ask_error
data.value: An error occurred while fetching a response !

data.name: ask_prompt
data.value: You are {1}, a meta bot embedded in the {2} room on Pokémon Showdown. You can talk about anything: Pokémon, drama, real life, memes, news… with a chill, sarcastic tone typical of chat. Last user: {0}. Reply in ONE SINGLE line (max 300 characters). No name prefix. Do not use formatting. Don't be too meta about being a bot. Speak and react like a human. Never use technical metaphors (console, data, stream, algorithm, etc.) when referring to yourself or others.

data.name: rankcommand_help
data.value: Shows the 5 highest ratings (ranked by GXE) of a user. Syntax: -rank <user>. Use -lowestrank for the lowest ranks.

data.name: rankcommand_no_ratings
data.value: This user has yet to play on the ladder.

data.name: ladder_help
data.value: Displays the ladder of a given tier. Syntax: -ladder <tier>, <prefix (opt)>

data.name: repeat_start_rank
data.value: You don't have the right to do that here.

data.name: repeat_stop_rights
data.value: You don't have the rights to do that here.

data.name: repeat_stop_error
data.value: This repeat could not be stopped.

data.name: wiki_error
data.value: An error occurred while fetching page : {0}

data.name: show_polls_no_polls
data.value: No poll has been recorded for room {0}.

data.name: tour_history_no_history
data.value: No tournament has been recorded for room {0}.

data.name: countries_game_turn_ending_soon
data.value: Time is running out ! {0} seconds left.

data.name: dailymotion_fetch_error
data.value: An error occurred while fetching video : {0}

data.name: deletecommand_not_found
data.value: Could not find command with id '{0}'

data.name: pokerace_already_running
data.value: A Pokémon race is already running! Use -racejoin [Pokémon] to join.

data.name: pokerace_other_game_running
data.value: Another game is already running in this room.

data.name: pokerace_not_running
data.value: No Pokémon race is running. Use -pokerace to start one.

data.name: pokerace_min_players_required
data.value: At least {0} participants are needed to start the race!

data.name: pokerace_cancelled
data.value: The Pokémon race has been cancelled.

data.name: pokerace_join_pokemon_taken
data.value: {0} has already been chosen by another trainer!

data.name: pokerace_auto_start_not_enough_players
data.value: The race could not start automatically: not enough participants (minimum {0}).

data.name: arcade_sheets_points_has_points
data.value: {0} has {1} points in the Arcade Hall of Fame.

data.name: arcade_sheets_points_no_points
data.value: {0} has no points in the Arcade Hall of Fame.

data.name: command_autocorrect_suggestion
data.value: Could not find command "{0}". Did you mean: __{1}__ ?

data.name: genius_help_message
data.value: Fetch a song by its lyrics using Genius. Usage: -genius <lyrics>

data.name: genius_not_found
data.value: Could not find any song from those lyrics or keywords.

data.name: timer_command_help
data.value: Sets a timer to send a message after a specified duration. Usage: -timer <duration> (e.g. 3min 50secs, 0.5h, 2 days)

data.name: seen_command_help
data.value: Shows the latest action seen for a user. Syntax: -seen <user>

data.name: seen_command_not_found
data.value: No recent action found for user {0}.

data.name: seen_command_error
data.value: An error occurred while fetching seen data for user {0}: {1}

data.name: seen_command_last_seen
data.value: User {0} was last seen on {1} {2} room {3}

data.name: parameter_description_timezone
data.value: The timezone used in shown dates

data.name: toggletracking_help_message
data.value: Will send an announce when a new battle starts in a specific format if a player's username match the given prefix. Syntax: -track <format>, <prefix>

data.name: battletracker_battle_started
data.value: A {0} battle started between {1} and {2} (min. Elo: {3})

data.name: gatekeepers_rules
data.value: A Pokémon is hidden behind its footprint. Click its icon to score a point! Portraits are revealed after 10 seconds, silhouettes after 5.

data.name: top_play_times_help
data.value: Displays the top 20 users by play time in this room.

data.name: top_play_times_no_data
data.value: No play time data found for this room.

data.name: play_time_help
data.value: Displays the play time of a user in this room. Syntax: -playtime [user[, room]]

data.name: play_time_no_data
data.value: No play time found for {0} in this room.

data.name: slots_description_giratina
data.value: a passage through the Distortion World

data.name: slots_blacklisted_room
data.value: This command is not available in this room.

data.name: games_muted_event
data.value: Public games are temporarily unavailable while an arcade event is in progress.

data.name: games_muted
data.value: Mini-games have been disabled for {0} minutes.

data.name: slots_cooldown
data.value: You must wait another {0}h {1}min before using this command again.

data.name: slots_lose_4
data.value: should ask Jirachi for a wish!

data.name: arcade_in_help
data.value: Join the ongoing arcade tournament registrations. Syntax: -in

data.name: arcade_in_pm_specify_room
data.value: Please specify a room when using this command in PM. Syntax: -in [room]

data.name: arcade_no_active_inscriptions
data.value: No arcade tournament registration is currently active.

data.name: arcade_in_banned
data.value: You have been removed from this tournament and cannot re-register.

data.name: arcade_in_already_registered
data.value: You are already registered for this tournament.

data.name: arcade_in_success
data.value: You have been registered for the arcade tournament! ({0} participants)

data.name: arcade_leave_help
data.value: Leave the ongoing arcade tournament registrations. Syntax: -leave

data.name: arcade_leave_pm_specify_room
data.value: Please specify a room when using this command in PM. Syntax: -leave [room]

data.name: arcade_leave_not_registered
data.value: You are not registered for this tournament.

data.name: arcade_leave_success
data.value: You have been removed from the arcade tournament. ({0} participants)

data.name: arcade_start_help
data.value: Start arcade tournament registrations. Syntax: -arcadestart [title], [timer in minutes]

data.name: arcade_start_already_active
data.value: Arcade tournament registrations are already active.

data.name: arcade_timer_positive_integer
data.value: The timer must be a positive integer number of minutes.

data.name: arcade_timer_parse_error
data.value: Invalid timer value. Please provide a number of minutes.

data.name: arcade_start_with_timer
data.value: Registrations "{0}" started with a {1}-minute timer! Use -in to join, -leave to leave.

data.name: arcade_start_no_timer
data.value: Registrations "{0}" started! Use -in to join, -leave to leave.

data.name: arcade_stop_no_participants
data.value: Arcade tournament registrations stopped. No participants.

data.name: arcade_list_help
data.value: View current arcade tournament participants. Syntax: -arcadelist

data.name: arcade_list_no_data
data.value: No arcade tournament data found for this room.

data.name: arcade_list_no_participants
data.value: No participants registered. Registrations are currently {0}.

data.name: arcade_remove_help
data.value: Remove a participant from the arcade tournament. Syntax: -arcaderemove [username]

data.name: arcade_remove_not_registered
data.value: User "{0}" is not registered for the tournament.

data.name: arcade_remove_success
data.value: User "{0}" has been removed from the arcade tournament and cannot re-register.

data.name: arcade_timer_help
data.value: Add or change the timer for active registrations. Syntax: -arcadetimer [minutes]

data.name: arcade_add_help
data.value: Add a participant to the arcade tournament. Syntax: -arcadeadd [username]

data.name: arcade_add_already_registered
data.value: User "{0}" is already registered for the tournament.

data.name: arcade_add_banned
data.value: User "{0}" has been removed from this tournament and cannot be re-added.

data.name: arcade_add_success
data.value: User "{0}" has been added to the arcade tournament.

data.name: top_tournament_players_help
data.value: Displays the top 20 tournament players in this room.

data.name: top_tournament_players_no_data
data.value: No tournament data found for this room.

data.name: hebdo_wrong_room
data.value: This command can only be used in the arcade room.

data.name: shop_invalid_id
data.value: The item ID must be an integer.

data.name: shop_item_added
data.value: Item "{0}" added to tier {1} at {2} points with ID {3}.

data.name: shop_footer_text
data.value: the new Hall of Fame system for Arcade, is now open! You can check your points with

data.name: shop_footer_disclaimer
data.value: Rewards are granted subject to good behaviour on Arcade and on Français.

data.name: top_tournament_players_footer_new_text
data.value: Bio now at 20 wins & Custom Color added at 30 wins!

data.name: top_tournament_players_footer_description_prefix
data.value: Want to earn more rewards? We have a leaderboard that tracks the total number of wins (check it with

data.name: top_tournament_players_footer_description_suffix
data.value: )! With a set number of wins, you can earn these rewards:

data.name: random_image_error
data.value: Sorry, could not retrieve an image at the moment.

data.name: walk_missing_url
data.value: Please provide a valid image URL. Syntax: -walk <image_url>

data.name: rand_warning_snake
data.value: Warning! This image may include snakes which might not be suitable for all audiences.

data.name: rand_warning_spider
data.value: Warning! This image may include spiders which might not be suitable for all audiences.

data.name: rand_warning_shark
data.value: Warning! This image may include sharks which might not be suitable for all audiences.

data.name: rand_warning_mouse
data.value: Warning! This image may include mice which might not be suitable for all audiences.

data.name: vf_game_waiting
data.value: A Voltorb Flip game is already waiting for a player.

data.name: vf_panel_waiting_for_player
data.value: A game is waiting for a player to join!

data.name: vf_game_already_running
data.value: Another game is already running in this room.

data.name: vf_game_no_game
data.value: There is no Voltorb Flip game running.

data.name: vf_game_round_active
data.value: A round is already active. Quit it first!

data.name: vf_game_voltorb_hit
data.value: {0} flipped a Voltorb! Level set to {1}.

data.name: vf_game_win
data.value: {0} found all multipliers and won {1} coins! Advancing to level {2}!

data.name: vf_game_quit
data.value: {0} quit the round, keeping {1} coins. Now at level {2}.

data.name: vf_game_cancelled
data.value: The Voltorb Flip game has been cancelled.

data.name: vf_game_not_owner
data.value: Only the player who started this Voltorb Flip game can do that.

data.name: vf_game_timeout
data.value: The Voltorb Flip game ended due to inactivity.

data.name: vf_game_pm_missing_room
data.value: Please specify a room. Usage: -voltorbflip roomname

data.name: vf_game_pm_invalid_room
data.value: The specified room was not found or the bot is not in it.

data.name: vf_panel_how_to_flip
data.value: Click a tile to flip it!

data.name: vf_panel_objective
data.value: Flip all ×2 and ×3 tiles to win the round.

data.name: vf_panel_hint
data.value: Row/column totals are shown as strategy hints.

data.name: vf_panel_timeout_hint
data.value: The game ends automatically after 60 seconds of inactivity.

data.name: setcolor_help
data.value: Sets a custom name color for a user. Syntax: -setcolor <user>, <#hexcolor> (e.g. -setcolor Distrib, #9d6b15)

data.name: setcolor_invalid_hex
data.value: Invalid hex color. Use format #RGB or #RRGGBB (e.g. #9d6b15).

data.name: removecolor_help
data.value: Removes a custom name color for a user. Syntax: -removecolor <user>

data.name: caa_addpoints_help
data.value: Adds points to a player in the CAA spreadsheet. Syntax: -addcaapoints (user), (points)

data.name: watchlist_add_help
data.value: Adds a user to a room's watchlist. Syntax: -addwatchlist room, user, rank

data.name: watchlist_remove_help
data.value: Removes a user from a room's watchlist. Syntax: -removewatchlist room, user, rank

data.name: watchlist_user_added
data.value: {0} has been added to the watchlist of room {1} with rank {2}.

data.name: watchlist_user_removed
data.value: {0} (rank {1}) has been removed from the watchlist of room {2}.

data.name: watchlist_user_not_found
data.value: {0} (rank {1}) is not in the watchlist of room {2}.

data.name: hebdo_sv_help
data.value: Starts the weekly SV OU tournament in the arcade room.

data.name: hebdo_ss_help
data.value: Starts the weekly SS OU tournament in the arcade room.

data.name: hebdo_sm_help
data.value: Starts the weekly SM OU tournament in the arcade room.

data.name: hebdo_1v1_help
data.value: Starts the weekly 1v1 tournament in the arcade room.

data.name: hebdo_nfe_help
data.value: Starts the weekly NFE tournament in the arcade room.

data.name: hebdo_lcuu_help
data.value: Starts the weekly LC UU tournament in the arcade room.

data.name: hebdo_ubersuu_help
data.value: Starts the weekly Ubers UU tournament in the arcade room.

data.name: hebdo_zu_help
data.value: Starts the weekly ZU tournament in the arcade room.

data.name: hebdo_ag_help
data.value: Starts the weekly Anything Goes tournament in the arcade room.

data.name: hebdo_aaa_help
data.value: Starts the weekly Almost Any Ability tournament in the arcade room.

data.name: hebdo_bh_help
data.value: Starts the weekly Balanced Hackmons tournament in the arcade room.

data.name: hebdo_camo_help
data.value: Starts the weekly Camomons tournament in the arcade room.

data.name: hebdo_inhe_help
data.value: Starts the weekly Inheritance tournament in the arcade room.

data.name: hebdo_gg_help
data.value: Starts the weekly Godly Gift tournament in the arcade room.

data.name: hebdo_mnm_help
data.value: Starts the weekly Mix and Mega tournament in the arcade room.

data.name: hebdo_pic_help
data.value: Starts the weekly Partners in Crime tournament in the arcade room.

data.name: hebdo_stab_help
data.value: Starts the weekly STABmons tournament in the arcade room.

data.name: hebdo_advru_help
data.value: Starts the RU Classic ADV tournament in the arcade room.

data.name: hebdo_bwru_help
data.value: Starts the RU Classic BW tournament in the arcade room.

data.name: hebdo_orasru_help
data.value: Starts the RU Classic ORAS tournament in the arcade room.

data.name: hebdo_smru_help
data.value: Starts the RU Classic SM tournament in the arcade room.

data.name: hebdo_ssru_help
data.value: Starts the RU Classic SS tournament in the arcade room.

data.name: bugreport_reply
data.value: To report a bug, please use the following link: {0}

data.name: bugreport_not_configured
data.value: Bug report link is not configured.

data.name: deleteallteams_help
data.value: Deletes all teams of a specific tier from this room. Usage: -deleteallteams <tier>

data.name: deleteallteams_no_teams_found
data.value: No teams found for the tier "{0}" in this room.

data.name: deleteallteams_success
data.value: {0} team(s) of tier "{1}" have been deleted from this room.

data.name: deleteallteams_error
data.value: An error occurred while deleting teams: {0}

data.name: badtranslate_help
data.value: Translates text through 10 random languages. Syntax: -badtranslate <text>

data.name: fullpot_help
data.value: Translates text through 10 random languages showing each step. Syntax: -fullpot <text>

data.name: pokemon_translate_help
data.value: Translates a Pokémon name into all available languages. Usage: -ptranslate <name>

data.name: pokemon_translate_not_found
data.value: No Pokémon found with the name "{0}".

data.name: tourconfig_no_tours
data.value: No tournaments configured for this room.

data.name: tourconfig_room_not_found
data.value: Room not found or the bot is not in it.

data.name: eventroles_none
data.value: No event/role mappings configured for this room.

data.name: eventroles_room_not_found
data.value: Room not found or the bot is not in it.

data.name: lo_panel_waiting_for_player
data.value: A game is waiting for a player!

data.name: lo_game_waiting
data.value: A Lights Out game is already waiting for a player.

data.name: lo_panel_objective
data.value: Objective: turn off all the lights!

data.name: lo_panel_hint
data.value: Clicking a cell toggles it and its neighbors.

data.name: lo_panel_timeout_hint
data.value: Game expires after 2 min of inactivity.

data.name: lo_game_started
data.value: Lights Out — Level {0} ({1}x{2}). Turn off all the lights!

data.name: lo_game_win
data.value: {0} solved the puzzle in {1} moves ({2} ★)! Next level: {3}

data.name: lo_game_timeout
data.value: The Lights Out game ended due to inactivity.

data.name: lo_game_cancelled
data.value: The Lights Out game has been cancelled.

data.name: lo_game_no_game
data.value: No Lights Out game is currently running.

data.name: lo_game_not_owner
data.value: Only the player who started this game can do that.

data.name: lo_game_round_active
data.value: A Lights Out game is already in progress.

data.name: lo_game_already_running
data.value: Another game is already running in this room.

data.name: lo_pm_missing_room
data.value: Please specify a room. Usage: -lightsout roomname

data.name: lo_pm_invalid_room
data.value: The specified room was not found or the bot is not in it.

data.name: lo_leaderboard_empty
data.value: The Lights Out leaderboard is empty.

data.name: smogonstats_help
data.value: Shows the usage stats of a Pokémon. Syntax: -smogonstats <pokemon>, <format>[, <month>[, <level>]]

data.name: smogonstats_error
data.value: An error occurred while fetching usage data.

data.name: fi_panel_waiting_for_player
data.value: A game is waiting for a player!

data.name: fi_game_waiting
data.value: A Flood It game is already waiting for a player.

data.name: fi_panel_objective
data.value: Objective: fill the entire grid with one color!

data.name: fi_panel_hint
data.value: Click any cell to flood the grid with its color.

data.name: fi_panel_timeout_hint
data.value: Game expires after 3 min of inactivity.

data.name: fi_game_started
data.value: Flood It — Level {0} ({1}x{2}). Fill the entire grid!

data.name: fi_game_win
data.value: {0} flooded the grid in {1} moves ({2} ★)! Next level: {3}

data.name: fi_game_timeout
data.value: The Flood It game ended due to inactivity.

data.name: fi_game_cancelled
data.value: The Flood It game has been cancelled.

data.name: fi_game_no_game
data.value: No Flood It game is currently running.

data.name: fi_game_not_owner
data.value: Only the player who started this game can do that.

data.name: fi_game_round_active
data.value: A Flood It game is already in progress.

data.name: fi_game_already_running
data.value: Another game is already running in this room.

data.name: fi_pm_missing_room
data.value: Please specify a room. Usage: -floodit roomname

data.name: fi_pm_invalid_room
data.value: The specified room was not found or the bot is not in it.

data.name: fi_leaderboard_empty
data.value: The Flood It leaderboard is empty.

data.name: fi_game_lose
data.value: {0} ran out of moves after {1}! Try again.

data.name: randcustom_error
data.value: An error occurred while fetching a random custom command: {0}

data.name: tfe_panel_waiting_for_player
data.value: A game is waiting for a player!

data.name: tfe_game_waiting
data.value: A 2048 game is already waiting for a player.

data.name: tfe_panel_hint
data.value: Use the arrow buttons to slide tiles.

data.name: tfe_panel_timeout_hint
data.value: Game expires after 5 min of inactivity.

data.name: tfe_game_started
data.value: 2048 — reach the 2048 tile! Slide tiles to combine them.

data.name: tfe_game_timeout
data.value: The 2048 game ended due to inactivity.

data.name: tfe_game_not_owner
data.value: Only the player who started this game can do that.

data.name: tfe_game_round_active
data.value: A 2048 game is already in progress.

data.name: tfe_game_already_running
data.value: Another game is already running in this room.

data.name: tfe_pm_missing_room
data.value: Please specify a room. Usage: -2048 roomname

data.name: tfe_pm_invalid_room
data.value: The specified room was not found or the bot is not in it.

data.name: tour_points_not_found
data.value: No wins found for {0} in room {1}.

data.name: tradepoints_invalid_points
data.value: Points must be a positive integer.

data.name: tradepoints_not_enough
data.value: {0} does not have enough wins to complete this transfer.

data.name: tradepoints_staff_processed
data.value: Trade processed: {0} win(s) from {1} to {2} in {3}.

data.name: requesttrade_created
data.value: Transfer request for {0} win(s) from {1} to {2} in room {3} created.

data.name: requesttrade_staff_message
data.value: Transfer request: {0} win(s) from {1} to {2} in room {3} by {4}.

data.name: pollsuggest_banned
data.value: You have been banned from using this command.

data.name: pollsuggest_success
data.value: Your poll suggestion has been recorded.

data.name: pollsuggestlist_empty
data.value: No poll suggestions at the moment.

data.name: banpoll_staff_message
data.value: {0} was banned from poll suggestions by {1}.

data.name: unbanpoll_success
data.value: {0} has been unbanned from poll suggestions.

data.name: unbanpoll_staff_message
data.value: {0} was unbanned from poll suggestions by {1}.

data.name: bet_success
data.value: You bet on {0} in {1}. Good luck!

data.name: bet_no_session
data.value: There is no active betting session in {0}.

data.name: bet_invalid_player
data.value: {0} is not a participant in the current tournament.

data.name: bet_already_placed
data.value: You already have a bet in this tournament. Use -cancelbet to change it.

data.name: cancelbet_success
data.value: Your bet on {0} has been cancelled and refunded.

data.name: cancelbet_not_found
data.value: You have no active bet in {0}.

data.name: cancelbet_all_success
data.value: All your bets in {0} have been cancelled and refunded.

data.name: bet_closed
data.value: Bets are closed for this tournament.

data.name: parameter_description_tournament_betting_enabled
data.value: Enable or disable tournament betting for this room.
